productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Style Note Look stylish with these black leather shoes in a classic design from red tape. These shoes with the tapered toe boxes are designed for comfort and will look great when teamed with chinos or pants and shirts for a casual look. Product Details Round toed black derby shoe with four hole lace-ups Upper adhered to the outsole TPU outsole with flex grooves and a stacked heel Material and Care Leather Wipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dust and dirt Do not store in direct sunlight
